title: cyphia volubilis f. major
intro: Cyphia volubilis f. major, also known as the Cyphian vine, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyphia volubilis f. major include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in various regions.
